welcome_text: Hello! My name is ARRUA Alejandro
who_i_am: Since 2018, I transform business visions into scalable platforms. As a Systems Analyst and Fullstack Developer, I don't just write code; I design architectures that solve real-world problems. My approach combines backend robustness (.NET/Node) with fluid user experiences (React/Next.js). My goal is simple: choosing the technology stack that maximizes ROI and maintainability for every project.
help_text: Can I help you with something?
